prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic double-exposure portrait of a handsome young South Asian man in a regal golden traditional outfit, set during a dramatic sunset. The composition has two versions of the same man: one enormous side-profile portrait dominating the background, facing right, wearing stylish round eyeglasses with only the rim and temple visible, dark thick swept-back hair, sharp jawline, and warm golden rim light; and one full-body seated version in the foreground, positioned lower left on rugged mossy rocks, wearing an ornate mustard-gold embroidered sherwani or kurta with matching trousers, a long draped stole, and polished brown leather loafers. The seated figure rests casually with one knee raised, one arm across the knee, and the other hand relaxed, looking confident and royal. Behind them is a hazy ancient hilltop fortress and cityscape stretching into the distance, with stone walls, towers, and arches, all bathed in amber sunlight. The sun sits low near the right horizon, with glowing orange clouds, atmospheric haze, distant mountains, and a flock of small birds in the sky. Use warm gold, copper, and sepia color grading, epic Bollywood-style cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high-detail skin and fabric texture, realistic hair, intricate embroidery, dramatic scale contrast, and a vertical poster composition. The image contains exactly two human figures: one giant background side-profile portrait and one seated foreground full-body figure. No text, no logo, no watermark.
